name: marketplace
description: Official AI Skills marketplace for Claude Code and Codex by aiskillstore. Contains security-audited SKILL.md-based agent skills organized by contributor. Includes JSON schema validation, package.json with ajv/gray-matter dependencies, and a pending/ directory for skills awaiting review.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 10/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 8609 files analyzed. Found: 63 network, 129 file, 66 env, 43 system calls. Primary: unknown.

agent_c_star.comment: 13570 findings: 2 critical, 4103 high, 5088 medium, 4377 low. Obfuscation detected!. Injection patterns found!.

agent_d.comment: Score 10. 0 mismatches. Risk: critical. Safety overrides: applied.

agent_e.comment: Rejected. Confidence 95%. Deterministic override: injection patterns detected.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 10/100, Risk: critical. 0 mismatches, 13570 scanner findings. Rejected at 95% confidence. Safety overrides triggered.

pm_override.reason: PM override: AI Skills marketplace with 8,609 files including vendored Ruby gems. 13,570 scanner findings overwhelmingly from vendored dependency code (2,743 dangerous_calls, 2,389 network_ops, 4,377 file_ops, 2,699 env_access all from gem dependencies). Only 2 critical injection findings, 206 obfuscation findings all from vendored/minified code. The marketplace itself is SKILL.md-based agent skills with JSON schema validation. Vendored dependency noise, not actual risk.
